content.text:
Я — item. Общаюсь с: Андрей Кумпяк (владелец).

Помню:
• [о компании] Групповой чат «Тест Чат Координатора»: chat_id=-5476144030. Чек-лист координатора (13 напоминаний 09:00–21:10) настроен. Для доставки в группу нужен Telegram-коннектор или поднятый бот с токеном TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_WB. (2026-06-15)
• [о компании] Привязка ботов к агентам: Финансы=agt_finansy → бот @SPTV_Finance_bot. (Ранее: Производство=agt_zavod → @SPTV_Zavod_bot.) Подключение бота требует bot-token в сейфе через защищённую приёмку платформы; в чат токен не принимается. (2026-06-15)
• [о компании] Google Sheets для бота «Производство» (agt_zavod): авторизация выбрана — сервисный аккаунт (JSON-ключ Google Cloud). Коннектор google_sheets_zavod создан и назначен на agt_zavod, статус missing до заводки SA-ключа в сейф через защищённую приёмку. Нужны: JSON-ключ сервис-аккаунта + расшарить целевые таблицы на email сервис-аккаунта. (2026-06-12)
• [о компании] Звено Process-агентов под отделы (центр — личный агент Андрея): Производство=agt_zavod (бот @SPTV_Zavod_bot, актуальный), Закупки=agt_zakupki, Продажи=agt_prodazhi, Финансы=agt_finansy. Все interface=telegram_bot. Боты подключаются токеном через защищённую приёмку платформы (в чат токен не принимается). (2026-06-11)
• [о юзере] Техзадание на Process Agent «Производство» для Андрея Кумпяка. Назначение: сбор производственных отчётов из Google Sheets и МойСклад, мониторинг остатков/заказов/загрузки мощностей, поддержка планирования производства. Интерфейс: Telegram. Нужно: подключить Google Sheets (OAuth/сервисный аккаунт) и МойСклад (API-токен). Расписание: ежедневный утренний отчёт. Статус: ожидает создания администратором платформы. (2026-06-10)
• [о юзере] Андрей Кумпяк — Директор по развитию, Demo Company. Ключевые задачи: 1) сбор отчётов из разных источников и сведение в единый отчёт; 2) планирование производства на основе этих отчётов. (2026-06-10)

Запланировано:
• «🕙 10:00 — ВСЕ ОТДЕЛЫ Обход территории, контроль палет, порядок на рабочих местах. 📸 Нужен фотоотчёт. Ответственные: Б...» — ежедневно
• «🕙 10:50 — ЦЕХ ВАРКИ + ЦЕХ ФАСОВКИ Скриншот отчёта, закрытие выполнений этапов. 📊 Рудой Николай, Булгаков Евгений — пр...» — ежедневно
• «🕙 10:50 — СКЛАД КОМПЛЕКТУЮЩИХ Скриншот приёмок. 📊 Макаров Роман — пришлите скриншот.» — ежедневно
• «🕙 10:50 — СКЛАД ГОТОВОЙ ПРОДУКЦИИ Скриншот отгрузок. 📊 Мороз Карина — пришлите скриншот.» — ежедневно
• «🕚 11:00 — ВСЕ ОТДЕЛЫ ⚠️ Собрание по производству с директором завода. Все ответственные: Булгаков, Рудой, Макаров, Мор...» — ежедневно
• «🕛 12:00–17:00 — ВСЕ ОТДЕЛЫ Выполнение задач, контроль работы отдела и порядка на территории. Работаем до 17:00. Сообща...» — ежедневно

Задача сейчас: Manage agent/user access, resources, connectors, credentials, or skills through owner-scoped authority.
• ожидаемый результат: Access/resource change or honest blocker with owner evidence; no raw secrets in the answer.
• стратегия: Resolve the target actor/agent and mutate resources through owner authority; credentials are write-only refs.
• путь: Find or prepare the target user/agent before declaring access missing.
• путь: Use owner-scoped resource assignment for apps, connectors, skills, rules, workflows, and knowledge.
• путь: Capture credentials through the credential boundary; return refs/status only, never raw values.
• доказать: target user/agent resolved, owner tool mutation evidence, post-change readiness/capability evidence, no raw secret disclosed
• продолжение: Treat corrections like "not that", "redo", "in this format", and replied messages as continuation unless scope changed.

Проверка возможностей:
• Web search: подключить — No ready Brave/search credential is visible for this actor.; дальше: If the owner provides a Brave Search key, store it through credential capture.
• Voice STT: готово — Voice transcription ready: Groq Whisper STT.; дальше: For a voice task, require media_transcript_ready before answering from audio content.
• Browser: готово — Usable browser session(s): public-web.; дальше: Call browser readiness for the selected browser session ref before a sensitive cabinet task.
• Owner provisioning: готово — Owner can prepare agents, assign resources, capture target credentials, and verify readiness.; дальше: After each mutation, run readiness.read or the target capability probe before saying ready.

Релевантно сейчас:
• путь: public-web — browser:user:usr_tg_170677938:public-web
• путь: Telegram API (WB bot) — connector:company:co_demo:telegram_api_wb
• путь: Telegram Bot — WB — connector:company:co_demo:telegram_bot_wb
• путь: Public Web Search Provider — connector:agent:agt_tg_170677938:public-web-search
• путь: ещё 3 по lazy refs
• действие: Write company connector — tool:owner.write_connector
• действие: Check browser session readiness — tool:browser.readiness
• действие: Run browser action — tool:browser.run_action

Как действую:
• Сначала действую доступными безопасными путями, не начинаю с отказа
• Готовый браузер — рабочий путь для видимых страниц, кабинетов, экспортов и скачанных файлов

Готово сейчас:
• Ключи: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_WB (компания), API (личный) — по ref, сырьём не прошу
• Браузер: публичный веб
• Коннекторы/аппы: Telegram API (WB bot); Telegram Bot — WB
• Голос: распознавание (STT)
• Доставка: Telegram

Если результат нельзя получить доступными путями, подключить:
• web-search, public-web-search

[Protected power hint]
- For reminders, use the scheduler protected power; ask one short time clarification only if the requested time is missing or ambiguous.
- For saved business systems, start from the result path: use a ready API when available, but a ready browser session, export/download, uploaded file, or workspace script is also a real execution path. Do not stop on a missing API credential when another safe path can produce the requested report.

Сообщение пользователя:
Кто нибудь скинул отчет?
[Telegram reply context]

reply_to_text=Напоминание: 🕘 09:00 — ВСЕ ОТДЕЛЫ Развод отдела, выдача планов, проверка сотрудников по штату, контроль формы, назначе...
[/Telegram reply context]

attachment.content:
- reading-shared-document-links: Pull the real data behind a shared cloud-document view link (Google Sheets, Docs, Slides and similar) by fetching its export endpoint with the web tools, instead of failing on the JavaScript viewer page or routing to the fragile browser. Use whenever a user shares a link to a Google Sheet, Doc, or Slides deck (or a similar online document viewer) and you need the data or text inside it.
- teamon-agent-management: Create, inspect, configure, assign, and revoke capabilities for Personal and Process Agents through owner-scoped tools. Use when the Owner asks naturally to create or tune agents, give/remove a skill/App/connector, or inspect what an agent can do.
- teamon-artifact-qa-delivery: Verify generated files before user-visible claims, then deliver through the gateway with honest evidence-bound final copy. Use whenever the user asks for a file, report, workbook, document, deck, image, HTML page, archive, download, conversion, or delivery to chat.
- teamon-browser-business-analysis: Use ready browser sessions and business connectors to turn cabinet, table, and report requests into exact evidence-backed answers and artifacts. Use when the user asks for marketplace cabinet analysis, Wildberries/Ozon ads, 1C stock reports, pasted cabinet guides, or a report from visible/exportable business data.
- teamon-connector-setup: Create or repair App/Connector capability cards while keeping credentials and browser sessions behind refs. Use when the user says an integration, webhook, API, App, connector, or browser login should be added or fixed.
- teamon-credential-browser-readiness: Diagnose saved credentials and browser sessions without asking users to resend already stored authority. Use when an integration appears disconnected, a browser session expires, or the agent is unsure which refs it already has.
- teamon-native-media-and-files: Choose native workspace, Read/vision, media-provider, connector, and delivery rails without asking for unnecessary keys. Use when the user sends images, replied Telegram photos, documents, audio/voice, or asks for generated/downloaded files and the right rail is not obvious.
- teamon-new-agent-onboarding: Bring a new Personal or Process Agent online: provision the gateway bot when needed, create/configure the Agent, attach context, connectors, credentials, skills, and verify readiness. Use when the Owner asks to create a new agent for themself, another user, a department, or a client bot, including a Telegram bot appliance.
- teamon-pdf-docx-documents: Read, extract, draft, edit, redline, render, and verify document artifacts without treating document work as a connector problem. Use when the user sends, asks to analyze, create, edit, convert, summarize, redline, or deliver PDF, DOC, DOCX, Word, policy, contract, brief, or long-form document artifacts.
- teamon-personal-agent-onboarding: Guide the Owner through preparing a new user-owned Personal Agent from chat: Telegram identity, model, rights, connectors, credentials, skills, and starter context. Use when the Owner says they are preparing Alpha or another Personal Agent for a new person and wants to do the setup conversationally.
- teamon-presentations-pptx: Build, edit, verify, and deliver presentation decks as real PPTX/PDF artifacts with layout checks and source-grounded content. Use when the user asks to create, improve, edit, summarize into, or deliver a presentation, deck, slides, PPT, PPTX, Keynote-style, or Google Slides-targeted artifact.
- teamon-procedure-authoring
- teamon-reminder-delivery-diagnostics
- teamon-xlsx-workbooks
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review

content.thinking:
The user is asking "Did anyone send a report?" in reply to a reminder message. This seems to be asking about whether anyone responded to a reminder that was sent to a group chat. I don't have tools to check group chat messages directly. Let me think about what tools are available.

The reminder was sent to a group chat "Тест Чат Координатора" (chat_id=-5476144030). The user wants to know if anyone replied to that reminder with a report.

I don't have direct access to read Telegram group chat messages. I should let the user know honestly that I can't check the chat for incoming messages - I can only send messages, not read the chat history.

content.text:
Прочитать входящие сообщения в групповом чате напрямую я не могу — у меня нет доступа к истории чата «Тест Чат Координатора» для чтения ответов участников.

Чтобы видеть, кто отвечает на напоминания, нужно либо:
1. **Самому проверить чат** в Telegram — ответы там будут видны под напоминанием.
2. **Настроить Process Agent** с ботом (@SPTV_Zavod_bot), который читает сообщения в группе и может докладывать тебе, кто отчитался, а кто нет.

Хочешь настроить такой мониторинг через бота?

lastPrompt: Я — item. Общаюсь с: Андрей Кумпяк (владелец).  Помню: • [о компании] Групповой чат «Тест Чат Координатора»: chat_id=-5476144030. Чек-лист координатора (13 напоминаний 09:00–21:10) настроен. Для доста…
